## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and the module that owns it.

## Contract and safety

- [ ] JSON/schema and exit-code behavior is explicit.
- [ ] Target, focus, pointer, viewport, and output recovery semantics remain honest.
- [ ] No runtime network, OCR, click, keyboard, clipboard, UI, or private API was added.
- [ ] Tests and fixtures contain no real application or personal data.

scripts/verify-cli.sh
